ICandidateParameterConfig Interface

public interface ICandidateParameterConfig

The ICandidateParameterConfig type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
CandidateDataList
Returns the list of valid candidate data sources.
ParameterName
Name of the URL parameter
Top
Methods
  NameDescription
AddTargetUrl
Adds a new target URL. If the method is not declared, or if it is not a CRUD method, an error will be generated.
ValidateAsync
Validates the parameter value for the given request.
